steps.title: Add the equations to eliminate y
steps.content:
The coefficients of $y$ are $+1$ and $-1$, so adding the two equations eliminates $y$:

$$(3x + y) + (9x - y) = 21 + 3$$
$$12x = 24$$
$$x = 2$$

steps.title: Conclude the number of solutions
steps.content: Obtaining a unique value for $x$ means the system has exactly one solution. The two linear equations represent lines that intersect at exactly one point. That matches choice D — D is correct.
